content: This is a classic logical paradox known as the "omnipotence paradox." It presents a contradiction: if God can create such a stone, then God is not all-powerful because God cannot lift it; but if God cannot create the stone, then God is also not all-powerful. The paradox challenges the logical coherence of the concept of absolute omnipotence.
